# REL-01 — required native libraries a win-x64 release artifact MUST contain.
# Checked by scripts/check-native-manifest.sh against the publish directory: each entry is a PREFIX (so
# avcodec-62.dll matches "avcodec-"). '#' comments and blank lines are ignored.
# Optional natives (NDI — licensing; ASIO — optional PortAudio host API) are intentionally NOT listed here.

# Decode (FFmpeg 8.1 — from the FFmpeg.GPL NuGet, lands in the publish):
avcodec-
avformat-
avutil-
swresample-
swscale-

# Audio backends:
portaudio.dll
miniaudio.dll

# MIDI, subtitles, MMD physics (shipped features):
portmidi.dll
ass.dll
mmd_bullet.dll
